data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Code correct + CI Verified+1 + full pre-flight green. Verifier's failing criterion 'delete docs/bash-migration.md' rested on a FALSE premise (the ticket claimed no inbound links; in fact 9 production-source module docstrings + README + archive cite its section numbers, so deletion would orphan them). Kept as the historical migration record; the actual cited drift (event-schema.md ticket_txn.py->_commands/txn.py, api-stability version, README CLI, version-sync guard) was delivered. Closed without signature per this justified divergence.". Session: 1c432ca13.
